psalm-64-1.verse: Hear my voice, O God, in my complaint; Preserve my life from dread of the enemy.
psalm-64-1.prayer: Lord, hear my voice when I bring my concerns before You. Preserve my life from fear and help me trust in Your protection.

psalm-64-2.verse: Hide me from the secret counsel of evildoers, From the tumult of those who do iniquity,
psalm-64-2.prayer: Father, hide me from harmful plans and protect me from anything that rises against my peace, faith, or obedience to You.

psalm-64-3.verse: Who have sharpened their tongue like a sword. They aimed bitter speech as their arrow,
psalm-64-3.prayer: Lord, guard me from words that wound and accusations that discourage. Help me respond with wisdom, grace, and truth.

psalm-64-4.verse: To shoot from concealment at the blameless; Suddenly they shoot at him, and do not fear.
psalm-64-4.prayer: Father, protect me from hidden attacks and unseen dangers. Keep my heart steady and confident in Your care.

psalm-64-5.verse: They hold fast to themselves an evil purpose; They talk of laying snares secretly; They say, “Who can see them?”
psalm-64-5.prayer: Lord, when evil seems bold or hidden plans seem strong, remind me that You see everything and remain perfectly just.

psalm-64-6.verse: They devise injustices, saying, “We are ready with a well-conceived plot”; For the inward thought and the heart of a man are deep.
psalm-64-6.prayer: Father, You know the depths of every heart. Search me, purify me, and keep my motives aligned with Your truth.

psalm-64-7.verse: But God will shoot at them with an arrow; Suddenly they will be wounded.
psalm-64-7.prayer: Lord, defend me with Your power and bring justice according to Your perfect wisdom and timing.

psalm-64-8.verse: So they will make him stumble; Their own tongue is against them; All who see them will shake the head.
psalm-64-8.prayer: Father, let falsehood and harmful words lose their power. Help truth, humility, and righteousness prevail.

psalm-64-9.verse: Then all men will fear, And they will declare the work of God, And will consider what He has done.
psalm-64-9.prayer: Lord, let my life lead others to recognize Your works and stand in awe of Your justice, wisdom, and power.

psalm-64-10.verse: The righteous man will be glad in the Lord and will take refuge in Him; And all the upright in heart will glory.
psalm-64-10.prayer: Father, help me rejoice in You and take refuge in Your presence. Let my heart remain upright, thankful, and confident in Your faithfulness.

psalm-64-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for being my refuge, defender, and righteous Judge. Protect me from fear, harmful words, and hidden dangers. Search my heart, strengthen my faith, and help me walk in truth and integrity. May my life rejoice in Your protection and point others toward Your wisdom, justice, and unfailing love.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-64-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for being my refuge, defender, and righteous Judge. Protect me from fear, harmful words, and hidden dangers. Search my heart, strengthen my faith, and help me walk in truth and integrity. May my life rejoice in Your protection and point others toward Your wisdom, justice, and unfailing love.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
